onboarding.slide1Desc:
Systematic training across 6 categories:
Melodic Dictation, Rhythmic Dictation, Interval Recognition, Chord Recognition, Key Identification, and Two-Part Dictation
onboarding.slide2Desc:
Listen to audio and notate the melody,
or identify intervals and chords with multiple choice
onboarding.slide3Desc:
Prepare for real exams with mock tests
in entrance exam and certification formats
onboarding.slide4Desc:
Review progress and statistics by category
to identify weaknesses and study efficiently
